main.description: Extended metadata sidecar for a project collection. Created with the same TID as its parent collection to link them together, allowing metadata updates without changing the collection's CID.

startDate.description: When the project is planned to start or started.

endDate.description: When the project is planned to end or ended.

videoUrl.description: URL to a project overview or impact video (YouTube, Vimeo, etc.).

urls.description: Additional reference URLs related to the project (websites, reports, datasets, etc.).

context.description: Free-form additional context about the project.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.
